query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "sciatlas: a large-scale knowledge graph for automated scientific resea" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for Graph Machine Learning (GML) and Knowledge Graph (KG) node classification, which are the core technical components of the user's "SciAtlas" knowledge graph system. It also meets criterion (b) by addressing the specific domain challenge of limited data and sparse features in knowledge graphs, a critical variable for extending large-scale scientific research platforms.
